info.title: Fortress Search (SearXNG)
info.description:
Self-hosted SearXNG meta-search. Free upstream to Google/Bing/DuckDuckGo. Covers MC workflows: G1 quoted-address off-market search (Agent 1), G2 LoopNet Firsthand listing verification (Agent 1+2), G3 Secretary of State entity lookup (Agent 3+2), G4 state/county assessor lookup (Agent 1+5), G5 public records / deed change detection (Agent 1+8).

Query patterns:
- G1: q="[full address]"
- G2: q=site:loopnet.com "[address]"
- G3: q="[entity] LLC" "[state]" secretary of state
- G4: q="[city] [state] property assessor" OR q="[county] county [state] property records"
- G5: q="[address]" deed OR recorder OR "grant deed"

Critical G2 rule: a LoopNet result page is only 'listed' if it shows a current broker contact + live price. Stale/expired pages are NOT listed (per Fortress false-positive discipline).

get.summary: Meta-search across Google/Bing/DuckDuckGo. Returns JSON results. Prefer quoted-address queries for property lookups.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Query string. Always quote full addresses.

200.description: .results[] each { url, title, content (snippet), engine }. .infoboxes[] for structured entity data.
